mapper.select: select cuv.id, cuv.user_id, cuv.vip_id, cuv.buy_time, cuv.expire_time, cuv.status, cvl.name, cvl.level, cvl.max_ab_amount, cvl.max_active_task, cvl.price, cvl.avaliable_day from coins_user_vip cuv left join coins_vip_level cvl on cuv.vip_id = cvl.id where cuv.user_id = #{userId} and cuv.status = 1 and cvl.status = 1 and cuv.expire_time > now() and is_renew = 0 order by cvl.level desc
